title: Week of April 13 - April 17, 2026] DarkFlow Smart Money Signals - Full Results (17 signals, 82.4% win rate)
author: klymaxx45

comments.author: Ok_Permission3367
comments.body: Your measuring "peaked in the green" not actual exit P&L. SNDK lost 75.6% on the same week. Options signals measured by peak vs entry is a known cherry-pick-adjacent metric

replies.author: klymaxx45
replies.body: Current is the actual exit P&L if held until expiration. My 100% transparency rule is to avoid cherry-picking gimmicks. Peak shows the maximum return if you exit at highs, while current shows the real return held all the way through expiration. You manage your position, so the system doesn’t calculate anything else. I, personally, enforce a 50% stop loss, trim at targets, and use a trailing stop for runners.
